title: Analytics - Device Release Notes Opened
scenario: Analytics events logged when viewing device-specific release notes in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Select a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
Go to Device Settings for the selected device.
Locate and tap on Release Notes (device-specific).
View the release notes content on screen.
expected: Analytics logs are generated when device-specific release notes are viewed. Default analytics elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) are captured. Event counts update after a few hours.
